corrections.note: Printed body reads συνπονεῖ, not συμπονεῖ.
Apparatus variant for ℵ is ἑτερος, not repeated εταιρος.
Abbreviation in apparatus shows συνπ., matching printed συνπονει.

corrections.current: | ψι incp ℵ* (ψυχ. ℵ¹ et postea)
corrections.correct: | ψι incp ℵ* (ψυχ. ℵ¹ et postea)
corrections.note: Printed Latin abbreviation is incp, not incp.

corrections.current: | αυτον] υτον supr ras Bᵃ | εαυτον Bᵃ (ε non inst Bᵇ) ℵ
corrections.correct: | αυτον] +σοι αυτον supr ras Bᵃ | εαυτον Bᵃ (ε non inst Bᵇ) ℵ
corrections.note: Apparatus includes an omitted variant +σοι before αυτον.

notes: Marginal line/verse indicators and page number 718 are correctly transcribed. Running head matches image.
